query: Comparison of energy density metrics: Graphene-enhanced Li-ion vs. traditional Solid-State Electrolytes
critical_facts: Graphene serves as a conductive additive in the anode; Solid-state electrolytes eliminate liquid flammability risks.

query: NIST Post-Quantum Cryptography Round 4 finalists and lattice-based security metrics
critical_facts: Kyber was selected for primary standard; Round 4 focuses on key encapsulation mechanisms (KEMs).

query: Structural evolution of carbon-fiber composite wings in commercial aviation (2010-2026)
critical_facts: Primary shift from aluminum to CFRP; 2026 focuses on thermoplastic recyclability and wing-tip folding mechanisms.
